pages.text: Utility Mobs was created by $(l:https://www.curseforge.com/members/fathertoast/projects)FatherToast$(), the original author of the mod and all of its golems, turrets, and colossi.$(br2)This is a 1.12.2 port with new content and features added on top. All credit for the $(o)original$() concept and content goes to FatherToast.

pages.title: Thanks for Playing
pages.text: That's the lot - go build an army. Enjoy your golems!
